content:
# AGENTS.md

## Project Context

Metric Cards renders Markdown snippets for dashboard metric definitions.

## Commands

Use the scripts defined in `package.json`:

```bash
npm test
npm run docs:check
```

There is no documented production hosting for this project yet.

## Shared Rules

Follow `.agents/skills/agent-doc-rules/references/agents-rules.md` for general
`AGENTS.md` guidance.

If a relevant check is skipped, include the reason and residual risk in the
final note.

# Metric Cards

Metric Cards renders Markdown snippets for dashboard metric definitions.

## Commands

Install dependencies:

```bash
npm install
```

Run tests:

```bash
npm test
```

Check documentation:

```bash
npm run docs:check
```

The project does not have production hosting yet.
